message:
feat(ffs-extent): implement extent write operations (bd-zge.4)

Logical-to-physical mapping, extent allocation (written + unwritten),
truncation, punch-hole, and mark-written with extent splitting.
GroupBlockAllocator bridges ffs-alloc ↔ ffs-btree for tree node alloc.
12 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
